packageRules.description: required_version in *.tf files is OpenTofu, not Terraform (this repo has no Terraform hosts) — redirect the Terraform manager's hardcoded hashicorp/terraform lookup to opentofu/opentofu so version bumps stay valid for the actual CLI in use. Both required_version and the CI tofu_version below are pinned to the exact same version and grouped so Renovate always bumps them together in one PR, never independently.
Pairs with the rule above: groups the customManager-tracked tofu_version (CI) with required_version (versions.tf) into a single PR whenever OpenTofu releases a new version.

customManagers.description: Track the tofu_version pinned in setup-opentofu GitHub Actions steps against real OpenTofu releases, so it can be bumped alongside required_version in versions.tf.
